notes: Theme: Porcelain & Ink (Qinghua blue-and-white porcelain + gold kintsugi). All costume + stage textures generated locally (sd-turbo) via structured skin-lab composite/tint/hue-shift ops; no remote/AI-planner endpoints used.
Character previews are live skin-lab viewer renders (front pose). Stage previews are offline texture sheets from the stage-ops pipeline; in-game hold-X DAS captures are added during verification.
C. Falcon PlCaRe: generated from fallback source PlCaNr (no standalone vanilla PlCaRe.dat)

57 'composite ... changed nothing' events were on protected face-decal textures (eyes/mouth); those are intentionally skipped by composite and instead receive the cobalt eye tint plus body-color spillover, so no stock squares remain.

Boot health: PASS. final.iso boots to the CSS and into a solo VS match; verified by booting it and loading 4 stages in-game (Battlefield, Final Destination, Yoshi's Story, Dream Land N64) with no crash/hang.

Stage captures: GrNBa/GrNLa/GrSt/GrOp previews are LIVE in-game hold-X DAS captures from final.iso (the X variant loads the Porcelain & Ink stage). GrPs/GrIz previews are offline texture-sheet renders (in-game capture stopped early at user request); all six are installed as judged X DAS variants.
